Study the following information carefully and

answer the questions accordingly.

towards the center, but not necessarily in the

the right of R. Only one person sits between Q

and T, who is immediate left of R. As many

persons sit between S and T is the same as

between Q and S, who is an immediate

neighbour of R. P sits second to the left of U. P

does not sit on the corner of the table.

Which of the following statement(s) is/are true

with respect to the final arrangement?
